aboutPage.title: About the Project
aboutPage.idea1: This application is built around a simple but powerful concept: supporting your wishes through short periods of discipline.
aboutPage.idea2: In many cultures, people practice temporary self-restraint or "ascetic commitments" to strengthen their intention toward something meaningful. The idea is that when we consciously give up something or practice discipline for a limited time, we focus our energy and attention on what truly matters to us.
aboutPage.idea3: This app brings that idea into a modern, simple digital experience.
aboutPage.idea4: Instead of just writing down goals or wishes, you actively support them through small, intentional actions.
aboutPage.createWishDesc: Start by writing down something meaningful you would like to happen in your life. It could be a new job, improved health, personal growth, or any other intention.
aboutPage.makeCommitmentDesc: Choose a short discipline challenge that you will follow for a number of days. Examples:
aboutPage.checkInDailyDesc: Each day you confirm whether you kept your promise. This builds a streak and keeps you accountable.
aboutPage.completeChallengeDesc: If you successfully complete the commitment period, you have symbolically supported your wish through discipline and focus.
aboutPage.closeWish: Close the Wish When It Comes True
aboutPage.closeWishDesc: The wish can stay open as long as needed. When it eventually happens, you can return to the app and mark it as fulfilled.
aboutPage.whyIntro: This approach works because it combines several powerful psychological principles:
aboutPage.focusDesc: A commitment reminds you daily about what truly matters to you.
aboutPage.disciplineDesc: Short challenges help build self-control and consistency.
aboutPage.accountabilityDesc: Daily check-ins create awareness of your actions.
aboutPage.motivationDesc: Watching your progress grow keeps you engaged and inspired.
aboutPage.reflectionDesc: When your wish eventually comes true, you can look back at the effort you invested.
aboutPage.personalJourney1: This app is not just about tracking habits. It is about creating a meaningful connection between your actions and your intentions.
aboutPage.personalJourney2: Each wish becomes a small journey.
aboutPage.personalJourney3: Over time, you build a collection of wishes, commitments, and stories of personal growth.
aboutPage.dataStorage1: Your wishes and commitments are stored only in your browser (local storage). Nothing is sent to or saved on a server.
aboutPage.dataStorage2: Data is tied to the device and browser you use. If you open the app on a different device or in a different browser, you will not see your existing wishes or progress. There is no sync or cloud backup.
aboutPage.shareProgress1: You can also share your progress with others using visual cards that show your discipline streak and challenge progress.
aboutPage.shareProgress2: This makes it easier to celebrate milestones and stay motivated.
aboutPage.startSmall1: You do not need a big goal to begin.
aboutPage.startSmall2: Start with a small wish and a short commitment. Even a few days of discipline can create a powerful sense of progress.
aboutPage.tagline: Your wishes deserve your attention, intention, and effort.
